Part 1 of a 3-part frontend interview series — HTML, CSS, and React coming next. Follow to not miss them!
Press enter or click to view image in full size

JavaScript Interview Question
● What is Ecmascript in Javascript?
● What is the difference between let, const, and var?
● What are the spread operator, the rest operator, and the default parameter?
● What are deep copy and shallow copy in JavaScript?
● What are promises, callback functions, and async/await in JavaScript?
● What is the difference between a promise and a callback in JavaScript?
● What are event bubbling and event capturing in JavaScript?
● What is a higher-order function in JavaScript?
● Explain different-2 types of functions in JavaScript?
● What is an arrow function in JavaScript?
● Why do we use call, apply, and bind methods in JavaScript?
● How many way to create objects in JavaScript?
● What is prototype inheritance in JavaScript?
● What is TypeScript?
● What are the array methods and string methods?
● What is the difference between Java and JavaScript?
● What are throttling and debouncing in JS?
● What are null and undefined in JavaScript?
● What are the falsy values in JavaScript?
● What are the execution context, event loop, stack, call queue, and microtask queue in JavaScript?
● What are setTimeout and setInterval in JavaScript?
● What is an object.seal and object.freeze in JavaScript?
● What is the difference between map and set in JavaScript?
● What are WeakMap and Weakset in Javascript?
● What are sessionStorage, localStorage, and cookies?
● Write a program to sort an array.
● What is the use of the JSON.stringify and JSON. parse() method in JavaScript?
● What are map, filter, and reduce in JavaScript?
● What is a generator function in JavaScript?
● How to stop event propagation in JavaScript?
● What is closure in JavaScript?
● What is housing in JavaScript?
● What is a dead zone in JavaScript?
● What is function currying in JavaScript?
● What is a mutation observer in JavaScript?
● What is memorization in JavaScript?
Technical Questions
● Write a program to find the element occurrence in an array.
● Write a program to remove duplicate items from an array.
● Write a program for following output :- console.log("output with normal function",mul(2)(4)(6))
● Write a program to multiply two numbers without using multiply Sign in JavaScript
● Write a program to sort in JavaScript?
● Write a program to make a polyfill for the map method in JavaScript: Array.prototype.mymap = function (cb)
That’s Part 1- JavaScript questions✅
Next up: HTML and CSS interview questions, then React and basic web.
